prompt_text:
### Demographics: 76-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Mild Cognitive Impairment with early Dementia
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 71.2 kg; Height 171.2 cm; BMI 24.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.4%; 9 months ago 11.0%; 6 months ago 10.5%; 3 months ago 10.0%; current 10.0%), FPG (12 months ago 300mg/dL; 9 months ago 303mg/dL; 6 months ago 229mg/dL; 3 months ago 281mg/dL; current 219mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 70.2kg; 9 months ago 71.3kg; 6 months ago 70.1kg; 3 months ago 71.1kg; current 71.2kg), Height (12 months ago 171.2cm; 9 months ago 171.2cm; 6 months ago 171.2cm; 3 months ago 171.2cm; current 171.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 75mmHg; 9 months ago 75mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 74mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 20U/L), AST (12 months ago 25U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 30U/L; 3 months ago 30U/L; current 28U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.3mg/dL; current 0.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 74mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 75mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 74mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 70mL/min/1.73m²; current 72mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 77mg/g; 9 months ago 78mg/g; 6 months ago 76mg/g; 3 months ago 70mg/g; current 67mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 74mg/dL; 9 months ago 80mg/dL; 6 months ago 81mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 78mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 58mg/dL; 9 months ago 57mg/dL; 6 months ago 58mg/dL; 3 months ago 60mg/dL; current 59mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 150mg/dL; 9 months ago 154mg/dL; 6 months ago 167mg/dL; 3 months ago 156mg/dL; current 161mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.1g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 12.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
